description_long: This is an adult woman standing upright, wearing a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a V-neckline and a halter-style back. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, and she is wearing high-heeled shoes. The dress fits loosely and falls straight down, with no visible patterns or embellishments. Her arms are relaxed at her sides, and her posture is straight and balanced. The overall appearance is clean and formal, suitable for urban or semi-formal environments.
description: An adult woman in a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a halter back, standing upright in high-heeled shoes and a neat bun hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the V-neckline, sleeveless design, and straight fit of the dress, as well as the facial features and both shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight fall of the dress, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the halter-style back of the dress, the bun hairstyle, and the back of the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the straight silhouette of the dress, and the high-heeled shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless knee-length dress with halter back
